# CineWorkflo

> Official machine-readable guide for AI agents and LLM-assisted browsing.

## Canonical
- Site: https://cineworkflo.com
- Primary sitemap: https://cineworkflo.com/sitemap.xml
- Contact: https://cineworkflo.com/contact

## Product Summary
CineWorkflo is an AI video prompting workflow for filmmakers and creators.
It combines:
- Prompt Enhancer (idea -> production-ready prompt)
- Shot to Prompt (image -> detailed prompt)
- Prompt Vault (curated prompt library)
- Camera Moves guide (visual language for prompting motion)

Supported workflows include Runway, Pika, Kling, Luma, Sora, Meta, Seedance, Higgsfield, and similar AI video toolchains.

## Core Public URLs
- Home: https://cineworkflo.com/
- Prompt Vault: https://cineworkflo.com/prompts
- Shot to Prompt: https://cineworkflo.com/shot-to-prompt
- Camera Moves: https://cineworkflo.com/camera-moves
- Pricing: https://cineworkflo.com/pricing
- About: https://cineworkflo.com/about
- Contact: https://cineworkflo.com/contact
- Privacy: https://cineworkflo.com/privacy
- Terms: https://cineworkflo.com/terms

## Prompt Vault Categories
- Brand and Product Ads: https://cineworkflo.com/prompts/brand-and-product-ads
- Social and Short-Form Content: https://cineworkflo.com/prompts/social-and-short-form-content
- Cinematic and Storytelling: https://cineworkflo.com/prompts/cinematic-and-storytelling
- World and Environment Building: https://cineworkflo.com/prompts/world-and-environment-building
- Abstract and Motion Art: https://cineworkflo.com/prompts/abstract-and-motion-art
- AI Avatar and Character: https://cineworkflo.com/prompts/ai-avatar-and-character
- Sci-Fi and Concept Film: https://cineworkflo.com/prompts/sci-fi-and-concept-film
- Food and Cooking: https://cineworkflo.com/prompts/food-and-cooking
- Real Estate and Architecture: https://cineworkflo.com/prompts/real-estate-and-architecture

## Access + Plans (public marketing level)
- Prompt Vault: open access
- Prompt Enhancer: free tier with monthly generation cap, paid tier available
- Shot to Prompt: free tier with monthly generation cap, paid tier available
- Pro plan pricing is published on https://cineworkflo.com/pricing

## Crawl Guidance
- Public marketing, learning, and category pages are indexable.
- Privacy/terms pages are public reference pages.
- Do not treat ephemeral UI states (temporary loading/errors) as canonical content.

## Content Scope
- Educational prompt-writing and camera-language guidance
- Production-oriented AI video prompt examples
- No NSFW or harmful instructional intent
